summary: The 30-second flush interval is silently clamped to the flusher's 5-minute minimum.

comments.body: MetricsFlusher.Configure clamps anything below MinimumInterval (5 minutes) because the sink rate-limits, so this 30-second setting silently stays at 5 minutes and dashboards will not refresh faster. Either raise the sink limit and the clamp together, or set an interval the flusher actually honors.
